response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong technical leadership in developer tools (e.g., MCP, code generators, testing frameworks). However, his people management experience is limited to informal mentorship and workshop leadership, lacking direct team leadership in a managerial capacity. His mobile platform experience is minimal, and his expertise leans toward web/mobile apps rather than build systems or infrastructure. His recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure, which is tangential to the role's core focus on developer productivity tools.
strengths: Strong background in developer tools and testing infrastructure (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course)
Proven technical leadership through workshops, mentorship, and open-source contributions
Extensive polyglot experience and hands-on coding in multiple languages/frameworks
concerns: Limited direct people management experience in a formal leadership role (no team P&L responsibility)
Minimal experience with mobile platform ecosystems or build systems
Recent work in AI-agent infrastructure may not align closely with the role's focus on developer productivity tools
